## Texas Instruments characterized as fully priced despite strong cash flow and earnings

If TXN — the bellwether for analog and industrial semi demand — is viewed as fully priced despite strong fundamentals, the cycle rally in traditional semiconductor names may be approaching an upper bound. Relevant for assessing entry and add risk in non-AI semi positions.

- A valuation analysis flags TXN shares as fully priced at current levels.
- The assessment acknowledges strong underlying cash flow generation and earnings, per the headline.
- Debate centers on an analog semiconductor valuation ceiling in the current cycle context.
- No specific valuation multiple or price target is provided in the headline.
